name: Turkey Pizza Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the spaghetti sauce mix, tomato paste and half a can of water. Stir until well mixed.
2. Add oregano and mushrooms; bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Combine ground turkey, milk, bread crumbs, garlic salt, and pepper in a bowl.
5. Press the turkey mixture evenly over the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate.
6. Spoon the spaghetti sauce evenly into the meat crust; sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Place the pie plate in a preheated oven set to 350°F (175°C) and bake for 30 minutes.
8. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese; continue baking for an additional 15 minutes until heated through.
9. Allow to cool slightly before cutting into wedges to serve.
